module.name: confusionmatrix
module.description: A 2×2 confusion matrix (TP/FP/FN/TN) with predicted/actual axis labels, correct cells green and error cells red. Optionally shows accuracy/precision/recall.
module.aiSpec:
A 2×2 CONFUSION MATRIX for a binary classifier. Correct cells (TP, TN) are green; error cells (FP, FN) are red. Rows = Actual, columns = Predicted. Takes no body — the four counts and labels are all parameters. Not a general heatmap or data table.
Parameters: • tp / fp / fn / tn (integer ≥ 0, default 0) — the four cell counts. • pos (text, default Positive) — label of the positive class. • neg (text, default Negative) — label of the negative class. • metrics (boolean, default false) — also show accuracy / precision / recall / F1 below. • title (text, default empty) — optional heading shown above the matrix. • color_ok (color, default #22c55e) — accent for the correct (TP/TN) cells. • color_err (color, default #ef4444) — accent for the error (FP/FN) cells.
Example: <!-- @confusionmatrix tp: 85, fp: 10, fn: 5, tn: 100, metrics: true, title: Model A -->

param.name: metrics
param.label: Show accuracy/precision/recall
param.desc: Also show accuracy / precision / recall / F1 below

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.desc: Optional heading shown above the matrix

snippet.label: Confusion matrix
snippet.text: <!-- @confusionmatrix tp: 85, fp: 10, fn: 5, tn: 100, metrics: true -->
